overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The vehicle travels from busy commercial streets through a red-lit tunnel, then winding back alleys and parking lots before accelerating onto a main highway. Heavy rain creates reflective wet surfaces throughout the cyberpunk urban environment.

events.description: vehicle stops at intersection waiting for traffic light
approaching tunnel entrance with red interior lighting visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets, stopping at intersections and observing neon signage

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in same lane, stopping at traffic light

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement with pink neon glow mounted on building
elevated highway structure crossing above the street
striped concrete barriers lining the left side of the road
floating digital billboard displaying animated content
zebra crossing stripes on wet asphalt with traffic lights overhead

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk commercial district with intense neon lighting reflecting off wet asphalt. The vehicle navigates past holographic advertisements and construction barriers, stopping at an intersection before approaching a tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground tunnel with red accent lighting

events.description: entering tunnel causes dramatic shift from neon city lights to red-lit enclosed space
exiting tunnel into open roundabout area with parking lot visible

agents.ego_description: transiting through the tunnel, following other vehicles and navigating the curved path

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving ahead through the tunnel, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: rough concrete walls with graffiti tags and red neon strips running along the base
linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling providing dim illumination
colorful spray-painted murals covering the right tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete tunnel illuminated by red neon strips and graffiti-covered walls. The enclosed space creates a dramatic lighting change from the bright city streets, with only a few vehicles visible ahead. The tunnel curves gently before opening back to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley parking lot with construction barriers

events.description: slowing down to navigate tight turns in narrow alleyways
carefully maneuvering around pedestrians crossing the narrow street

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through tight back alleys and parking areas, avoiding obstacles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near vending machines

entered.detail: scattered garbage bags, cardboard boxes, and discarded items in an open parking area
bright yellow automated vending machines lined against the building wall
narrow passage between buildings leading to back streets with red-painted curbs
large painted artwork covering the side of a building with Asian characters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a cluttered back-alley parking lot filled with debris and vending machines. The vehicle slows to navigate narrow passages lined with construction barriers, passing pedestrians and graffiti-covered buildings before returning to main streets.

events.description: accelerating onto wider highway road, increasing speed significantly
following yellow car ahead, maintaining distance on wet highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the main highway, following a yellow vehicle through the rain at higher speeds

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving ahead on the highway, taillights glowing in the rain

entered.detail: tall concrete dividers separating lanes with metal guardrails
massive digital billboard spanning across the highway displaying advertisements
curved elevated roadway with reflective lane markings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto a wide multi-lane highway, leaving the narrow alleys behind. Following a yellow car through the heavy rain, the scene features large overhead billboards and concrete barriers lining the road, with neon lights reflecting off the wet surface as the speed increases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from vibrant commercial districts through a claustrophobic tunnel and into expansive highways. It begins by navigating wet asphalt streets filled with holographic advertisements and construction barriers before slowing to a stop at an intersection. As the vehicle enters a narrow concrete tunnel, the bright city lights shift to a dramatic red glow reflected off graffiti-covered walls, which curves gently until the space opens back to the outside. The scene then shifts into a cluttered back-alley parking lot, weaving through debris, vending machines, and pedestrians before returning to the main road. Finally, the camera accelerates onto a wide multi-lane highway, following a yellow car under massive overhead billboards as the speed increases amidst the heavy rain.
